=== info 14.07.1981.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
July 14, 1981
Freileichttheater
Bad Segeberg
West Germany

  
Very Good Audience Recording

Source: Trade CDRs>Soundforge 8 (New Track Marks, Channel Balance, Clean Up Joins, Fades)>
FLAC Level 6 align on sector boundaries

NOTE: Quite a bit of Microphone interference during early part of show, mainly between
numbers.  End cut on Dead Man, Dead Man.

As with all my transfers/torrents NO Normalisation or other alterations have been
made to the sound unless stated.

Mastered from CDRs & Artwork by JTT, March 2007
 
Disc One
01 Saved 
02 I Believe In You
03 Like A Rolling Stone
04 I'll Keep On Falling In Love Till I Get It Right 
05 Man Gave Names To All The Animals
06 Maggie's Farm
07 Girl From The North Country
08 Ballad Of A Thin Man
09 In The Summertime
10 Dead Man, Dead Man (faded)
11 Forever Young
12 Walk Around Heaven All Day 
13 The Times They Are A-Changin'
14 Let's Begin 
15 Lenny Bruce
  
Disc Two
01 Slow Train
02 Mr. Tambourine Man
03 Solid Rock
04 Just Like A Woman
05 Saved By The Grace Of Your Love
06 Watered-Down Love
07 Jesus Is The One
08 When You Gonna Wake Up
09 In The Garden
10 Blowin' In The Wind
11 It Ain't Me, Babe
12 Knockin' On Heaven's Door


File names & tags edited by Chopen, November 2009
